comment.text: This key displays the new monthly price for additional storage within the Order Summary panel of the Portal Settings. It appears as a label alongside the price value, likely related to a change in a storage plan. Translators should ensure the translation accurately conveys the updated cost.

usage.context:
{isDowngradeStoragePlan &&
 !isExceedingStorageLimit &&
 !isNewSubscription ? (
 <div className={styles.summaryRow}>
 <Text fontSize="14px" className={styles.rowLabel}>
 {t("Services:NewMonthlyPrice")}
 </Text>
 <Text
 fontWeight="600"
 fontSize="14px"
 className={styles.rowValue}
